Class UIManager

java.lang.Object
simcli.ui.UIManager
public class UIManager extends Object
Centralised static utility for all user-facing output: screen clearing, hints, animations, prompts, warnings, and game-over stats.

Centralizes formatting and common CLI prompts so that the rest of the engine does not depend on system-specific print commands. All UI output in the application is routed through this class for consistency.

  • Constructor Details

    • UIManager

      public UIManager()

  • Method Details

    • clearScreen

      public static void clearScreen()
      Clears the terminal screen. Uses OS-specific commands (cls for Windows, clear for Unix) or falls back to printing empty lines.

    • printHint

      public static void printHint()
      Prints a randomly selected gameplay hint enclosed in brackets.

    • sleepAnimation

      public static void sleepAnimation()
      Displays a brief animated sequence of "Zzz..." to simulate time passing while a Sim sleeps.

    • displayActionAnimation

      public static void displayActionAnimation(Sim player)
      Briefly flashes the ASCII art for the Sim's current action before continuing.
      Parameters:
      player - the Sim performing the action to be rendered

    • printActionGrid

      public static void printActionGrid(Sim player, List<Interactable> items, boolean isResidential)
      Prints the primary command menu, dynamically separating contextual actions like interactable objects from system commands.
      Parameters:
      player - the currently active Sim
      items - the list of interactable objects available in the current room
      isResidential - true if the location is a home, exposing build/buy commands

    • printMessage

      public static void printMessage(String message)
      Standard utility to print a message to the terminal.
      Parameters:
      message - the string to print

    • printWarning

      public static void printWarning(String message)
      Standard utility to print an alert or warning, prefixed with [WARNING].
      Parameters:
      message - the warning string to print

    • prompt

      public static void prompt(String message)
      Flushes the SimulationLogger backlog and prepares the terminal for user input.
      Parameters:
      message - the prompt string (e.g., "COMMAND> ")

    • printGameOverStats

      public static void printGameOverStats(int totalTicks, int totalMoney, int totalItems)
      Prints the final statistics when all Sims in the household have died.
      Parameters:
      totalTicks - the total timeframe survived
      totalMoney - the total cash earned across the session
      totalItems - the total items purchased across the session
